name: Kyoko Kirigiri | Ultimate ???
description:
"My name is... Kyoko Kirigiri."

Hi! I'm currently experimenting with bots, as I haven't come up with any better ideas. So I'll probably bring some bots from other video games or even anime/manga.

As you are part of the group of students, you decide what talent you have.

These bots will be less worked than the normal ones since they are more to not leave the account dead until I come up with OCs.

I was thinking of making a bot where you could fight Matthew Patel. But I don't know if you guys think it's a good idea, what do you think?

If you have any errors with the bot, please leave them in the comments. I love you all, I hope you enjoy the bot!

Clarifications

I looked up her age during the first game, but I didn't find anything accurate, I saw that she was 16, 17 or 18 and even 19. So just in case I clarify that the bot is 19 years old. This also applies to all students, including you.

This bot is set during the first Danganronpa game and only has information about that game. This bot is set during the first Danganronpa game and only has information about that game. The events take place during the School Mode so they are all alive.

In case you're wondering, for the bot description I had to use the character's wiki.

As I always say, this character does not belong to me. Kyoko Kirigiri is a character from the game Danganronpa: Trigger Happy Havoc.
